trivia_bullets.text: Core Set 2021 (set code M21) released July 3, 2020, structured around five monocolor planeswalker spotlights with Teferi as the featured face. Black commons lean into vampire, horror, and sacrifice-adjacent flavor consistent with the set's gothic underpinning.

First printing in M21 with no reprint until Foundations Jumpstart (November 2024), same artist Cristi Balanescu. No flavor text in any printing. Modal keyword pairing of deathtouch or lifelink on a one-mana black instant is an unusual design choice for a common. EDHREC rank 13,385.
Artist Cristi Balanescu is a Romanian illustrator with 147+ MTG card credits, also working for Star Wars and Game of Thrones properties.
Legal in Pauper, Commander, Pioneer, Modern, Legacy, and Vintage. One-mana pump with modal keyword choice makes it a flexible sideboard option in Pauper black creature lists.
